description_long: This is a large, ornate book with a richly decorated cover featuring intricate gold patterns and embossed designs. The front cover is highly detailed, with symmetrical motifs and elaborate borders, giving it a luxurious, antique appearance. The spine is also adorned with gold embellishments and decorative text, suggesting a classic or historical edition. The pages are thick and yellowed, indicating age and high-quality paper. The back cover is plain and dark, contrasting with the ornate front and spine. The overall form is thick and rectangular, with visible wear that adds to its vintage character.
description: A large, antique book with an ornate gold-embossed cover and spine, thick yellowed pages, and a plain dark back.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showcasing elaborate gold patterns and embossed designs.
description_view_1: The book's fore-edge and part of the spine are visible, revealing thick, yellowed pages and decorative spine bands.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain and dark, with no visible decoration or text.
description_view_3: The spine is shown, featuring gold embellishments, decorative text, and intricate patterns.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features an elaborate, symmetrical design with ornate gold filigree and decorative motifs. The style is highly detailed and reminiscent of Victorian or Gothic revival bookbinding, with no pictorial illustration but rather a focus on ornamental patterns.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is richly decorated with gold patterns and embossed text, arranged horizontally and vertically, with intricate borders and flourishes. The design is classic and ornate, matching the front cover's luxurious style.
